compiled_state.title: Skill dispatch: /dso:sprint Skill tool invocation loops indefinitely instead of executing skill content
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: When invoking /dso:sprint via the Skill tool, the skill never executes its actual logic. Instead, it enters an infinite loop where each invocation produces another 'Invoke the /dso:sprint skill' prompt, causing the Skill tool to be called again recursively. Observed 6+ consecutive invocations before manual interruption. This affects the ability to run any sprint workflow. Likely cause: the skill's SKILL.md or plugin dispatch mechanism is emitting a re-invocation instruction instead of the actual skill content.

comments.body:
Investigation findings (pre-classification):
1. Plugin plugin.json at .claude-plugin/plugin.json declares two entry points: commands (3 files: commit.md, end.md, review.md) and skills (32 directories with SKILL.md).
2. /reload-plugins reports '1 plugin · 3 skills' — only counting commands/, not skills/.
3. .claude/commands/*.md (23 redirect stubs) check plugin presence via 'claude plugin list' and emit PLUGIN_DETECTED or LOCAL_FALLBACK. On PLUGIN_DETECTED, they instruct Claude to call Skill(dso:skill-name).
4. At session start in worktree, dso: skills are NOT loaded (Skill tool returns 'Unknown skill'). After /reload-plugins, they ARE loaded.
5. installed_plugins.json registers plugin for projectPath /Users/.../digital-service-orchestra but worktree is at .../digital-service-orchestra-worktrees/worktree-*. Path mismatch may cause delayed loading.
6. Loop mechanism: .claude/commands/sprint.md detects PLUGIN_DETECTED → tells Claude to call Skill(dso:sprint) → Unknown skill → Claude re-reads command → PLUGIN_DETECTED → loop.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 3 (INTERMEDIATE). severity=1, complexity=1, environment=0, intermittent=1.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
Investigation RESULT (INTERMEDIATE, high confidence):
ROOT_CAUSE: .claude/commands/*.md redirect stubs use overly broad plugin detection (grep for 'digital-service-orchestra' in global plugin list) that fires even when plugin skills aren't loaded for the current worktree session, AND stubs lack a fallback for Skill tool failure, causing an infinite loop.
Hypothesis tests (all confirmed):
1. Worktree path doesn't match registered projectPath
2. grep matches too broadly (4 lines from plugins across all projects)
3. No error handling in any of the 23 stubs for 'Unknown skill' failure
4. '3 skills' count matches commands/ dir (commit, end, review), not skills/ dir (32 dirs)
5. All 23 stubs identical two-branch pattern
6. No existing test covers this scenario
Recommended fix: Add third-branch fallback to all 23 stubs — if Skill tool fails, read SKILL.md directly.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Anti-pattern scan: all 23 .claude/commands/*.md stubs fixed in this batch — zero remaining candidates.
comments.author: Test
